summary: Iteration_15 — End-to-end testing of new Blog feature (public + admin + API). 8/8 backend pytest cases pass against /api/blog and /api/admin/blog (list/auth-gate/slug/draft default/publish/edit/delete). UI flows verified: BLOG appears as 5th nav item (Home/Journeys/Gallery/About/Blog/Get In Touch), public /blog empty state ('Stories are on their way.') renders correctly, admin sidebar 'admin-nav-blog' + dashboard 'tile-blog' present, /admin/blog manager shows 'Blog posts' title and 'No posts yet' state with 'New post' button, side drawer 'blog-editor-drawer' opens with ALL expected testids (blog-title-input, blog-excerpt-input, all 11 rich-text toolbar buttons, save-publish-btn). Created 'A Wild Tasmania Spring' with bold-marked body, verified it appears as a card on /blog with Read more link, navigates to /blog/a-wild-tasmania-spring detail page with H1 + date + bold body rendering. Status toggle Published<->Draft works (Draft removes it from public /api/blog). Edit drawer pre-fills title/excerpt/body. Title change 'A Wild Tasmania Spring (updated)' regenerates slug to '/a-wild-tasmania-spring-updated'; old slug 404s. Delete removes post from admin + public.

minor.issue: _slugify strips underscores without inserting a separator, so a title like 'TEST_Foo Bar' becomes 'testfoo-bar' (TEST and Foo merged). Spec said 'strips non-alphanumeric' so this is technically as designed, but worth confirming with product.
Response body is only {message,slug}. UI must re-GET to read fresh status/title/body. Not a bug but a minor inconsistency vs POST which returns the full post.

issues: Back link copy reads 'BACK TO THE JOURNAL' rather than 'Back to Blog' as named in the spec. Functionally equivalent (navigates to /blog). Confirm intent with product copy.
Em-dashes ('—') used in JS *comments only* (lines 11 and 408). Not user-facing, but project HANDOVER says 'no em dashes anywhere'. Recommend swapping to hyphens or 'and' for full compliance.

action_items: (Optional) Decide on underscore handling in _slugify (current behaviour merges words separated by '_').
(Optional) Align /blog/:slug back-link copy with spec ('Back to Blog' vs current 'Back to the journal').
(Cosmetic) Remove em-dashes from BlogManager.jsx comments to follow project no-em-dash rule.
critical_code_review_comments: BlogPostUpdate PATCH handler returns only {message, slug} (server.py around line 1614). For consistency with POST and to reduce a round-trip in the admin UI, return the full updated document.

_slugify behaviour around '_' may surprise users when titles contain underscores or pasted markdown. Consider treating '_' (and '/', ':') as separators that collapse to '-' rather than dropping them entirely.

Snapshot integration with blog_posts collection was not regression-tested in this run, but the existing About/Stories endpoints (/api/stories, /api/about-blocks) still respond 200, so the new _safe_replace('blog_posts', ...) call has not broken siblings.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (nav, public empty state, admin sidebar/tile/manager, new-post drawer w/ all testids, save+publish, public card+detail render, status toggle Published<->Draft, edit prefill, slug regeneration, delete) all verified

test_credentials: info@oncewerewild.com / ChangeMe-OWW-2026! (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Note: no MFA in this preview (OTP_LOGIN_ENABLED=false), login returns access_token directly.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted: 'A Wild Tasmania Spring' (+ updated variant), 'Toggle Test Post', and 'Hello'/'Hello'/'Hello' draft trio (verifying slug -2/-3 conflict resolution). All cleaned up — final /api/blog and /api/admin/blog both return [].
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blog feature is fully functional end-to-end. Backend uses field name 'body' (not 'body_html'). Admin auth is plain email+password in preview (OTP_LOGIN_ENABLED=false) — login returns access_token directly in response, no MFA. The status-toggle data-testid is 'status-toggle-{id}' (dynamic suffix). Delete uses window.confirm() — Playwright needs page.on('dialog', lambda d: d.accept()) BEFORE the click, or it stalls. Existing About/Stories endpoints (/api/stories returns 200) still work alongside Blog. nav.4.label DB value is 'Blog' (replacing old 'Contact').
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — this iteration is a feature-validation pass, not a bug investigation. All requested feature acceptance criteria were exercised and pass.
